nasb.text: For those blessed by Him will inherit the land, But those cursed by Him will be cut off.

esv.text: for those blessed by the Lord shall inherit the land, but those cursed by him shall be cut off.

cnv.text: 蒙耶和華賜福的，必承受地土； 受他咒詛的，必被剪除。

ccb.text: 蒙耶和华赐福的人必承受土地， 被耶和华咒诅的人必遭铲除。

csbs.text: 要知道，蒙耶和华祝福的，必继承地土； 被耶和华诅咒的，必被剪除。
